introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: Kiamba Mbithi & Company Advocates is committed to protecting the privacy and confidentiality of our clients and website visitors. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information.

infoWeCollect.title: Information We Collect
infoWeCollect.intro: We may collect the following types of information:
items: Contact information (name, email address, phone number)
Professional information (company, position, area of interest)

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Information
items: Provide legal services and respond to inquiries
Communicate about our services and updates
Comply with legal and regulatory requirements

dataProtection.title: Data Protection
dataProtection.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. All client communications and information are treated with strict confidentiality in accordance with professional legal ethics.

attorneyPrivilege.title: Attorney-Client Privilege
attorneyPrivilege.content: Communications with our firm may be protected by attorney-client privilege. We maintain strict confidentiality of all client information and communications in accordance with our professional obligations and Kenyan law.

infoSharing.title: Information Sharing
infoSharing.intro: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share information only when:
items: Required by law or legal process
Necessary to provide legal services you have requested

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: Our website may use cookies and similar technologies to enhance user experience and analyze website traffic. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Links
thirdParty.content: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these external sites and encourage you to review their privacy policies.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:

contactDetails.address: IHIT Centre, Dennis Pritt Road, Nairobi
